sections.paragraph: இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
to be without resources, to be in straits, to be left wanting, to be embarrassed, to be in doubt, not to know which way to turn
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From a compound of G1 (as a negative particle) and the base of G4198; to have no way out, that is, be at a loss (mentally): - (stand in) doubt, be perplexed.
